narrative:
Jefferson Township has 5,012 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.7 percentage points.
